center.name: Constantine Walter Benson
center.summary: Constantine Walter Benson是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Beesley's lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Beesley's Lark (Chersomanes beesleyi) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae. It was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the Spike-heeled Lark. The Beesley's Lark is found in Northern Tanzania, in some very restricted patches of Afrotropical grassland, mainly composed of Sporobolus ioclados and Digitaria macroblephara on volcanic soil.{{Cite journal |last=Beesley, John S
